title: Engineering Reports
description: Every report the design produces: PV, energy, cable, BOQ, economics, proposal.

steps.title: The PV report
steps.description: Array sizing, string design and derating.
steps.voiceScript: The PV report covers array sizing, string design and derating.
steps.captionText: The PV report covers array sizing, string design and derating.
steps.fallbackMessage: The PV report: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Energy report
steps.voiceScript: The energy report gives the yield month by month.
steps.captionText: The energy report gives the yield month by month.
steps.fallbackMessage: Energy report: the next screen is not reachable from here.

steps.title: Energy yield
steps.description: Monthly production against the load schedule.
steps.voiceScript: Monthly production is compared against your load schedule.
steps.captionText: Monthly production is compared against your load schedule.
steps.fallbackMessage: Energy yield: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Cable report
steps.voiceScript: The cable report sizes every run and checks volt drop.
steps.captionText: The cable report sizes every run and checks volt drop.
steps.fallbackMessage: Cable report: the next screen is not reachable from here.

steps.title: Cable sizing
steps.description: Volt drop and current capacity per run.
steps.voiceScript: Each run is checked for current capacity and volt drop.
steps.captionText: Each run is checked for current capacity and volt drop.
steps.fallbackMessage: Cable sizing: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: BOQ report
steps.description: The priced bill for the design.
steps.voiceScript: The BOQ report prices the whole design.
steps.captionText: The BOQ report prices the whole design.
steps.fallbackMessage: BOQ report: the next screen is not reachable from here.

steps.title: The priced bill
steps.voiceScript: Every item carries its rate and its total.
steps.captionText: Every item carries its rate and its total.
steps.fallbackMessage: The priced bill: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Economic report
steps.voiceScript: Finally the economic report: payback, internal rate of return and savings.
steps.captionText: Finally the economic report: payback, internal rate of return and savings.
steps.fallbackMessage: Economic report: the next screen is not reachable from here.

steps.title: Payback
steps.description: Against the tariff at your location.
steps.voiceScript: Payback is computed against the tariff at your location.
steps.captionText: Payback is computed against the tariff at your location.
steps.fallbackMessage: Payback: not visible on this screen yet.
